executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Target failed areas from prior run with emphasis on Admin Dashboard, Inventory CRUD, User Management, Forum report/comment flows, Notification System, and Responsive behavior. For any required login always use username: admin and password: 1234. IMPORTANT: clear username/email and password inputs before typing to avoid concatenated values from previous attempts. If login form label says 'Username or Email', input exactly admin as identifier.
